hooks.command: python3 -c "import glob,os,runpy,sys; r=os.environ.get('PLUGIN_ROOT',''); h=os.environ.get('CODEX_HOME') or os.path.expanduser('~/.codex'); c=[os.path.join(r,'hooks','run_capture.py')]+glob.glob(os.path.join(h,'plugins','cache','*','prompt-harness','*','hooks','run_capture.py')); c=[p for p in c if os.path.isfile(p)]; sys.exit(0) if not c else runpy.run_path(max(c,key=os.path.getmtime),run_name='__main__')"
hooks.commandWindows: python -c "import glob,os,runpy,sys; r=os.environ.get('PLUGIN_ROOT',''); h=os.environ.get('CODEX_HOME') or os.path.expanduser('~/.codex'); c=[os.path.join(r,'hooks','run_capture.py')]+glob.glob(os.path.join(h,'plugins','cache','*','prompt-harness','*','hooks','run_capture.py')); c=[p for p in c if os.path.isfile(p)]; sys.exit(0) if not c else runpy.run_path(max(c,key=os.path.getmtime),run_name='__main__')"
